info.title: openIMIS FHIR R4 API (mock subset)
info.description: Focused subset of the openIMIS FHIR R4 API (module openimis-be-api_fhir_r4_py) that the OpenFn openimis adaptor calls via getFHIR(path). Covers the health-insurance FHIR resources openIMIS exposes: Patient (insuree), Group (family), Claim/ClaimResponse, Contract (policy) and Coverage, CoverageEligibilityRequest, plus Location, Organization, Practitioner, PractitionerRole, HealthcareService, Medication and Condition. Resource-type GETs return a searchset Bundle; GET by id returns the resource.

post.summary: Authenticate and obtain a bearer token

Bundle.description: FHIR searchset Bundle returned for resource-type searches.
